evals.prompt: Check if the target enrichment API endpoint is healthy before running the lead enrichment pipeline.
evals.expected_output: Outputs telemetry result with circuit_breaker CLOSED and action PROCEED.
assertions: The action is PROCEED when HTTP status is 200 or 402

evals.prompt: The upstream provider returned 502 Bad Gateway. Run telemetry probe and protect treasury wallet funds.
evals.expected_output: Trips the circuit breaker and instructs the runtime to halt or reroute.
